rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §12.1211, which governs open-enrollment charter school website disclosures of governing body members.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school shall list the names of the members of the governing body on the home page of the school's Internet website.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject area (charter school governance transparency).
